upstream_note: v2: full 6x6. Top-level cells are the openai-egress row for v1 compatibility; the full grid is under upstreams.<egress>.cells keyed by ingress dialect.
capability_note: advisory context only (probe-first: every cell is probed regardless): TensorZero 2026.6.0 has no Cohere provider type; that cell is grey by that capability limit (model.rs)

openai.verdict_note: untestable: no upstream base-URL override reaches the test mock (a mock-reachability limit of this rig, not gateway incapability). TensorZero's google_ai_studio_gemini / gcp_vertex_gemini providers hardcode googleapis.com with no api_base override (google_ai_studio_gemini.rs @2026.6.0), so the harness mock cannot stand in for the upstream; TensorZero does serve Gemini in production

hardware: AWS m7g.4xlarge (Graviton3, 16 cores / 64 GB). Gateway-under-test pinned to 4 cores (the comparable basis); mock and load generator on 6 cores each so the mock never bottlenecks the streaming sweep. Ubuntu 24.04. One dedicated box per gateway.
